title: When Courage Feels Small
narration: Some days, courage feels small. It is getting out of bed when your heart is tired. It is facing a conversation you have been avoiding. God does not stand far away from that fear. He speaks this promise: “Don’t you be afraid, for I am with you. Don’t be dismayed, for I am your God. I will strengthen you. Yes, I will help you. Yes, I will uphold you with the right hand of my righteousness.” Isaiah 41:10. You do not have to manufacture strength tonight. Receive the help God promises. Jesus loves you, and stay blessed. Like and subscribe for more Christian content.

verse.text: Don’t you be afraid, for I am with you. Don’t be dismayed, for I am your God. I will strengthen you. Yes, I will help you. Yes, I will uphold you with the right hand of my righteousness.

visual_style: Cinematic devotional realism, soft crimson dawn, deep indigo shadows, reverent Christian symbolism, cohesive subtle film grain, no text, no logos, no depiction of Jesus, vertical 9:16.
